# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment Workflow

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: ubuntu-latest || macOS-latest || windows-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Setup env variables
      id: setenv
      uses: actions/setup-env
      with:
        secrets: ACCESS_TOKEN, SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, ...

    - name: Run custom build scripts and deployment commands
      run: |
          chmod +x ./scripts/*.sh
          ./scripts/${{ github.event.ref }}._build.sh
          ./scripts/${{ github.event.ref }}._deploy.sh
